variants.title: HiFi Filter SG 5016 Gas Filter | Replaces the SF Filter SAO 51263
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter SG 5016 Gas Filter is HiFi's replacement to the SF Filter SAO 51263. Easy to install and replace, the SG 5016 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
